query: SELECT g.menuItemId, o.name FROM menu_addon_groups g JOIN menu_addon_options o ON o.groupId = g.id WHERE g.menuItemId IN (150024, 150025, 150026, 150027) AND g.name LIKE '%molho%' ORDER BY g.menuItemId, o.displayOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2DPRZMbFg2pLCxP.d66dc093df58 --database hEsNGYEonud5ngJEe9CdHq --execute SELECT g.menuItemId, o.name FROM menu_addon_groups g JOIN menu_addon_options o ON o.groupId = g.id WHERE g.menuItemId IN (150024, 150025, 150026, 150027) AND g.name LIKE '%molho%' ORDER BY g.menuItemId, o.displayOrder;
